Vendored LandPPT dom-to-pptx bundle
===================================

Source: https://github.com/sligter/LandPPT
Source file: src/landppt/web/static/js/dom-to-pptx.bundle.js
Observed patch version: 2026-06-14-bg-layer-v4
License: Apache-2.0 for LandPPT. The bundled dom-to-pptx dependency is MIT.

This bundle is used only by the experimental PPTX export path. It includes
LandPPT's export fidelity patches for SVG, CSS backgrounds, icon handling,
font handling, and image render mode.
